title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: TeraWulf shares rise after $19B Anthropic AI lease, JV sale
summary: The Bitcoin miner signed a 20-year AI infrastructure lease with Anthropic and sold its majority stake in a separate AI data center joint venture.

title: Bitcoin Mining Stocks Jump After TeraWulf Signs $19 Billion Lease With Anthropic
summary: TeraWulf's 20-year lease deal with Anthropic is expected to generate $19 billion in revenue—and major Bitcoin mining stocks are surging.

title: FCA warns of major shakeup as AI agents meet tokenized money
summary: The FCA’s vision for agentic AI points toward a financial system where programmable money and tokenized assets could play a much larger role.

title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
summary: Even Realities, an ex-Apple team building camera-free smart glasses, raised $150 million from Meituan and Tencent at a $1 billion valuation.

title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
summary: While other humanoid startups chase sky-high valuations, Agility Robotics is betting its future on execution — and a SPAC.

title: Perplexity Co-Founder: AI Safety Is an Excuse to Lock Down Frontier
summary: Andy Konwinski used Anthropic's Fable 5 debacle as exhibit A in the case against letting a handful of private labs govern who gets to do AI research.

title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
summary: Mistral AI, which offers some open source AI models, has raised significant funding since its creation in 2023, with the ambition to “put frontier AI in the hands of everyone.”

title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report
summary: Sam Altman is pitching a 5% equity stake in OpenAI for the U.S. government—and reportedly wants every major AI company to do the same.

summary:
